setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive tests for UnitTest1 class, covering constructor and Test1() method with basic validation
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more meaningful logic to Test1() method to enable more robust testing
fileReports.note: Current implementation is minimal and requires additional business logic for meaningful testing

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, null input handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling in writeMessage method
Implement logging instead of Console.WriteLine for better testability
Add more detailed exception handling for Kafka-specific errors
fileReports.note: These tests provide basic coverage but may require additional mocking for full Kafka integration testing

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more detailed logging in exception handling paths
Implement more granular error handling in readMessage method
Add configuration options for timeout and retry mechanisms
keyImprovements: Null config and topic name handling
fileReports.note: Tests use mocking and FluentAssertions for robust validation. Ensure Confluent.Kafka dependencies are properly configured.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering all properties, constructors, and enum status values with 100% code coverage
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes to properties
Add XML documentation comments to clarify property purposes
Implement custom validation logic if needed for business rules
keyImprovements: Full coverage of OrderRequest model properties
Verified default and custom object initialization
fileReports.note: Tests cover basic model behavior without external dependencies

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController with 5 test cases covering various scenarios including valid order submission, model validation, serialization, constructor initialization, and producer wrapper interaction.
recommendations: Add more robust input validation in the controller
Consider adding logging for better traceability
Implement more detailed error handling for producer wrapper
Add exception handling for serialization and message writing
fileReports.note: Requires mocking of ProducerWrapper and ProducerConfig. Ensure Confluent.Kafka and Newtonsoft.Json packages are installed.
